Title: Homepage — Load and Hero Navigation
Preconditions: Fresh browser session, {{FRONT_URL}} accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] homepage fully loaded (hero banner visible)
[ASSERT] page title contains 'QA' or 'Main'
[ACT] click hero banner primary CTA (e.g., link inside banner heading)
[WAIT] target page loads
[ACT] click browser back
[WAIT] homepage reloads
Assertions:
[DOM] hero banner section visible above the fold
[DOM] 'Popular categories' section visible with at least 1 category tile
[DOM] navigation bar visible with 'All products' dropdown button
[DOM] language selector visible in top header
[DOM] cart icon accessible in main nav icon bar
[NAV] CTA link navigates to a category or catalog page (not 404)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors or uncaught exceptions on homepage load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on initial page load API calls
[NETWORK] no failed GraphQL requests on homepage render
Failure_Signals: Homepage blank or spinner stuck >10s (BL-CROSS-011), hero banner absent, JS TypeError on load, 4xx on homepage GraphQL queries

Title: Registration — Personal Account
Preconditions: Fresh browser, {{FRONT_URL}} accessible
Steps:
[SETUP] generate unique registration email: smoke-smk002-{current_unix_ms}@test-agent.com — store as reg_email for this session
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-up
[WAIT] account type selector visible
[ACT] select 'Personal' account type
[ACT] fill 'First Name': 'Test'
[ACT] fill 'Last Name': 'User'
[ACT] fill 'Email': reg_email
[ACT] fill 'Password': valid password
[ACT] check 'I agree to the Terms and Conditions'
[ACT] click 'Create Account'
[WAIT] redirect to homepage OR confirmation message
Assertions:
[DOM] confirmation message shown OR user redirected to authenticated homepage
[DOM] user name visible in header after redirect
[STATE] login with new credentials succeeds on retry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST to /connect/token returns 200 with access_token
[ADMIN] user visible under Customers in admin panel
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during form submit
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on account creation request
Failure_Signals: Validation error on valid email format, form stays on same page with no feedback, 400/500 on account create API, spinner stuck >5s
Cleanup: Delete test account via admin if environment requires cleanup

Title: Search — Query Returns Relevant Results
Preconditions: User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, search index healthy, products exist in catalog
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] homepage loaded
[ACT] click search bar in header
[ACT] type @td(SEARCH_KITCHEN.query)
[KEY] Enter
[WAIT] search results page loads at /search?q={search_term}
[ASSERT] at least 1 product result visible
Assertions:
[NAV] URL contains /search?q= with resolved search term
[DOM] page heading or result label contains the search term or result count
[DOM] at least 1 product card visible with name and price
[DOM] filter/facet panel available on results page
[FORMAT] all visible prices display with exactly 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] products query with filter @td(SEARCH_KITCHEN.query) returns items array non-empty, HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no search-related errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx on search GraphQL request
Failure_Signals: Zero results for known-existing term (search index down — ECL-14.2), filter panel absent, result count 0 while products visible, URL missing /search?q=, console errors on search

Title: Catalog — Category Browse to PDP
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, catalog accessible with at least 1 category containing products
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog
[WAIT] catalog page loads with at least 1 category tile visible
[ACT] click first category tile
[WAIT] product listing loads in selected category
[ASSERT] at least 1 product visible in grid
[ACT] click first product name or image to open PDP
[WAIT] product detail page loads
[ASSERT] product name visible as page heading
[ASSERT] price visible with 2 decimal places
[ASSERT] 'Add to Cart' button or quantity stepper visible
Assertions:
[DOM] catalog page loads with at least 1 category tile
[DOM] category listing shows at least 1 item with name, price, image
[DOM] PDP title matches the product clicked from listing
[DOM] price on PDP displays with exactly 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
[DOM] 'Add to Cart' button or quantity increment control visible and enabled
[DOM] breadcrumb trail visible on PDP (e.g., Home > [Category] > [product])
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] products query returns non-empty items array for selected category
[GQL] product query for clicked PDP returns price non-null
[CONSOLE] no errors during catalog → category → PDP navigation
[NETWORK] no 4xx on catalog or product queries
Failure_Signals: Catalog page loads with 0 category tiles, category loads with 0 products, PDP blank or 404, price missing or 0 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003), 'Add to Cart' button absent, breadcrumb missing

Title: Add to Cart — Single Product from PDP
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, product {{TEST_SKU}} in stock, cart empty
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[WAIT] PDP loaded, 'Add to Cart' button visible and enabled
[ASSERT] spinbutton shows '0' initially; 'Decrease quantity' button disabled
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' button
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '1'
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] success notification visible OR cart badge increments
Assertions:
[DOM] success toast/notification contains 'added' or 'cart' text
[DOM] cart icon badge increments by 1
[DOM] 'Decrease quantity' button was disabled at qty=0 (BL-CART-001)
[STATE] product appears in cart (navigate to /cart to confirm)
[FORMAT] price on PDP has exactly 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql (addItem mutation) returns HTTP 200
[GQL] addItem response errors[] is empty (HTTP 200 ≠ success — ECL-14.1)
[GQL] cart.items contains item with sku={{TEST_SKU}}
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during add action
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on addItem request
Failure_Signals: Spinner >5s after click, errors[] non-empty in addItem response (ECL-14.1), cart badge unchanged after 3s, 4xx/5xx on addItem, 'Decrease quantity' clickable at qty=0

Title: Quantity Stepper — PDP Increment and Cart Sync
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, in-stock product available with stock > 3
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog
[WAIT] catalog page loads with at least 1 category tile visible
[ACT] click first category tile
[WAIT] product listing loads
[ACT] click first product card to open PDP
[WAIT] PDP loads and 'Product quantity' spinbutton visible
[ASSERT] spinbutton shows '0' and 'Decrease quantity' button is disabled (mid-flow gate — BL-CART-007)
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' button
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '1', 'in Cart' indicator shows '1'
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' button again
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '2'
[ACT] click 'Decrease quantity' button
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '1'
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart loads
[ACT] click '+' on cart page to increase qty to 2
[WAIT] line total updates
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Decrease quantity' disabled at qty=0 (not clickable)
[DOM] spinbutton increments and decrements correctly
[DOM] 'in Cart' indicator on PDP reflects current quantity
[DOM] cart badge equals spinbutton value after each change
[DOM] no duplicate line items for same product in cart (BL-CART-007)
[MATH] cart line total = qty × unit price (2 decimal places)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] each +/- triggers addItem or changeCartItemQuantity mutation, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.items shows correct quantity after each change
[CONSOLE] no errors on rapid +/- clicks
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart mutations
Failure_Signals: 'Decrease quantity' clickable at qty=0, cart badge not syncing with PDP stepper, duplicate line items appearing (BL-CART-007), line total not recalculating, negative quantity accepted (ECL-5.3)
Cleanup: Remove product from cart after test

Title: Cart — View Items and Update Quantity
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with at least 1 item visible
[ASSERT] item shows name, image, unit price, quantity, line total
[ACT] click '+' (increase quantity) on first item
[WAIT] quantity increments, line total recalculates
[ASSERT] new line total = unit price × new quantity
[ACT] click '-' (decrease quantity) on the same item
[WAIT] quantity decrements, line total recalculates
Assertions:
[DOM] item displays name, image, price, quantity controls, line total before changes
[DOM] line total updates immediately after quantity change
[MATH] line total = unit price × updated quantity (2 decimal places — BL-PRICE-003)
[MATH] cart subtotal = sum of all line totals (BL-PRICE-008: no floating-point drift)
[FORMAT] all monetary amounts show exactly 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] changeCartItemQuantity mutation returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.total in response matches displayed grand total
[CONSOLE] no errors during quantity changes
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart update mutations
Failure_Signals: Quantity change not reflected in line total, subtotal doesn't recalculate, errors[] non-empty on mutation, $0.01 discrepancy in subtotal math (BL-PRICE-008), line total has wrong decimal places
Cleanup: Restore cart to at least 1 item if decrement removed the last

Title: Cart — Remove Item and Verify Total
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with at least 2 items
[ASSERT] note the cart subtotal before removal
[ACT] click 'Remove' (or trash icon) on the second item
[WAIT] item removed from list, subtotal recalculates
[ASSERT] removed item no longer appears in cart
[ASSERT] cart subtotal updated (equals previous subtotal minus removed item's line total)
Assertions:
[DOM] removed item absent from cart item list
[DOM] cart subtotal updates after removal (not stale)
[DOM] remaining items unaffected (names, prices, quantities unchanged)
[MATH] new subtotal = old subtotal − removed item line total (BL-PRICE-008)
[DOM] if cart is now empty: empty cart message visible
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] removeCartItem mutation returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.items no longer contains removed SKU
[CONSOLE] no errors during remove
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on removeCartItem
Failure_Signals: Item remains visible after remove (silent mutation failure), subtotal not recalculating, errors[] non-empty on removeCartItem, other items' prices changed after removal
Cleanup: Ensure at least 1 item remains in cart for subsequent tests

Title: Checkout — Delivery Address and Shipping Method
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Items in cart, user logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, cart has at least 1 item
Steps:

[ACT] select 'Delivery' shipping option (not Pickup)
[WAIT] shipping address section visible
[ACT] select existing address OR enter new valid US address (First Name: @td(ADDR_NY.first_name), Last Name: @td(ADDR_NY.last_name), Street: @td(ADDR_NY.street), City: @td(ADDR_NY.city), State: @td(ADDR_NY.state), ZIP: @td(ADDR_NY.zip), Country: @td(ADDR_NY.country))
[ACT] select first available shipping method (e.g., 'Ground')
[WAIT] shipping cost appears in order summary
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Delivery' option selectable and selected
[DOM] address form/selector visible after choosing Delivery
[DOM] shipping method list loads with at least 1 method
[DOM] shipping cost shown as non-zero amount in order summary
[MATH] displayed total = subtotal + shipping + tax − discounts (BL-CHK-006)
[DOM] 'Place Order' or payment section accessible after selecting shipping method
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] addOrUpdateCartShipment mutation returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.shipments[0].deliveryAddress populated correctly
[GQL] cart.shipments[0].shipmentMethodCode non-null after selection

[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on shipping mutations

Title: Checkout — Place Order and Confirm
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Cart with items, delivery address and shipping method already selected (follow-on from SMK-012)
Steps:
[WAIT] cart page with payment section visible
[WAIT] payment method section loaded (CyberSource: form visible on cart page — ECL-14.6; others: 'Place Order' button visible)
[ASSERT] 'Place Order' button (or payment submit) is enabled
[ACT] complete payment (use test card if prompted) or click 'Place Order' (single click — BL-CHK-002)
[WAIT] order confirmation page or redirect to /checkout/payment
[WAIT] page settles after order placement
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Place Order' button disabled immediately after first click (double-submit prevention — BL-CHK-002)
[DOM] order confirmation page shows order number in 'CO[digits]' format (BL-ORD-005)
[DOM] ordered products listed on confirmation page with names
[DOM] cart badge = 0 after order (cart cleared — BL-CROSS-005)
[NAV] URL contains /order/ or confirmation path
[DOM] order confirmation totals match cart totals from SMK-012 (BL-CHK-006)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] createOrderFromCart mutation returns 200, errors[] empty, orderId non-null
[ADMIN] order appears in admin panel under Orders with status 'New'
[CONSOLE] no errors on confirmation page
[NETWORK] GA4 'purchase' event fired (visible in network tab to google-analytics or gtag endpoint)
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during order placement
Failure_Signals: 'Place Order' remains clickable during processing (BL-CHK-002 violation), createOrderFromCart errors[] non-empty, order number absent on confirmation, cart not cleared (BL-CROSS-005), total mismatch vs cart (BL-CHK-006), duplicate order from single click
Cleanup: Note created order ID; cart is cleared by system — no manual cleanup needed

Title: Payment — Credit Card Authorization
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Checkout ready (cart with items, address selected), test card details available from .env
Assertions:
[DOM] payment form visible with card number, expiry, CVV fields
[DOM] card fields accept test card input without masking errors
[DOM] after submit: 'Place Order' button disabled immediately (BL-CHK-002: double-submit prevention)
[DOM] after submit: success message OR order confirmation visible
[STATE] order status = 'New' or 'Payment authorized' (not 'Payment failed')
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] payment processor webhook received (verify via admin order payment status)
[ADMIN] order payment status = Authorized or Paid
[CONSOLE] no payment script errors (note: ad-blockers may block iframe — ECL-14.6)
[NETWORK] no CORS errors on payment form requests
Failure_Signals: Payment form blank after page load (iframe blocked by ad-blocker — ECL-14.6), card fields reject valid test card, payment hangs >30s, 3DS challenge appears in test mode, button remains active after first click (BL-CHK-002)

Title: Order Confirmation — GA4 Purchase Event Fired
Preconditions: On order confirmation page after successful order (follow-on from SMK-013), GA4 tracking enabled
Steps:
[WAIT] on order confirmation page (after SMK-013 order)
[ACT] evaluate window.dataLayer: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase')
[ASSERT] purchase event found with correct transaction_id
[ACT] evaluate for duplicates: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase').length === 1
[ACT] refresh the confirmation page
[WAIT] page reloads
[ACT] evaluate window.dataLayer again: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase').length
Assertions:
[STATE] window.dataLayer contains exactly 1 'purchase' event before page refresh (BL-CROSS-005)
[STATE] purchase event transaction_id matches order number displayed on confirmation page
[STATE] purchase event value is a positive number (not 0 or negative)
[STATE] purchase event items[] is non-empty with product names
[STATE] page refresh does NOT fire a second purchase event (ECL-11.1: idempotent confirmation)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no GA4 script errors or blocked resource warnings
[NETWORK] GA4 /collect or gtag/js request fired with transaction_id matching order number
[NETWORK] single purchase event in network tab (no duplicates on page load)
Failure_Signals: dataLayer missing 'purchase' event entirely (BL-CROSS-005), transaction_id mismatch vs order number, event.ecommerce.value = 0 or negative, duplicate events fired on refresh (ECL-11.1)

Title: Order History — New Order Appears in Account
Preconditions: Order just placed (from SMK-013), user logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
Steps:

[ASSERT] most recent order visible at top of list
[ASSERT] order number matches the one from SMK-013 confirmation

[ASSERT] order items, subtotal, shipping, and total visible and match confirmation page values

[DOM] most recent order in list matches order number from SMK-013 (BL-CROSS-005)
[DOM] order detail shows all purchased items with names and prices
[DOM] order total on detail page matches confirmation page total (BL-ORD-005)

Cross_Layer_Checks:

[GQL] order detail returns items[] non-empty matching placed items
[CONSOLE] no errors on order history or order detail page
[NETWORK] no 4xx on order queries
Failure_Signals: Order absent from history (BL-CROSS-005), order number mismatch, totals differ from confirmation (BL-ORD-005), order detail page returns 404, order status shows unexpected error state

Title: Configurable Product — Price Updates on Option Selection
Preconditions: User logged in. Configurable product CFG-002 (Custom T-shirt) with options at different price points exists. Base price $12; options add to price. {{FRONT_URL}} accessible.
Steps:
[SETUP] resolve configurable PDP URL: @td(CFG_TSHIRT.url) → store as variation_url
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}{variation_url}
[WAIT] base price displayed before any section selection
[ACT] click 'Red Men T-shirt' in the required 'Choose basic T-short' section
[WAIT] price updates to reflect first option price (Red Men = base $12 + $10 = $22 or as displayed)
[ASSERT] price shows exactly 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
[ACT] click a different option in the same section (e.g., 'Black Women') with a different price
[WAIT] price updates again
[ASSERT] price updated to second option's price
[ASSERT] displayed total price has exactly 2 decimal places
Assertions:
[DOM] base price visible on PDP before selection
[DOM] price updates immediately after first option selected (no reload)
[DOM] price changes again after switching to second option in same section (no reload)
[FORMAT] price always 2 decimal places (e.g., '$22.00' not '$22')
[DOM] price displayed in section widget reflects selected option contribution
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] productConfiguration response includes option prices per section item
[GQL] configured price in cart matches selected option price from PDP
[CONSOLE] no errors during option switching
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during option selection
Failure_Signals: Price unchanged after switching options (stale cache — ECL-14.4), price displays without 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003), price not updating on option selection (no DOM change)

[PRE:RESET_CART]

Steps:

[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] cart badge > 0
[ACT] click 'OrgName / UserName' button in top-right header
[WAIT] account dropdown opens with 'Organizations' section
[ASSERT] organizations list with radio buttons visible
[ACT] click the radio button for a DIFFERENT organization in the list
[WAIT] page refreshes or context updates (org name in header changes)
[ASSERT] cart badge = 0 (cart isolated per org — BL-B2B-001)
[ASSERT] org name in header shows newly selected org
Assertions:
[DOM] account dropdown shows 'Organizations' section with search box and radio button list
[DOM] clicking different org radio button updates 'OrgName / UserName' header button text
[DOM] cart badge = 0 after org switch (BL-B2B-001, BL-CROSS-008: cart isolation)
[STATE] new org's cart is empty — Org A items do NOT carry over

Cross_Layer_Checks:

Title: Search to Cart — Full E2E Flow
Preconditions:

[PRE:RESET_CART]

Title: XSS Regression — Shipment Address and Contact Update (VCST-4803, VCST-4804)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}} (personal account). Known bugs: VCST-4803 (updateContact XSS in profile), VCST-4804 (shipment address XSS). These are regression checks to confirm the fixes hold.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/profile
[WAIT] profile page loads
[ASSERT] First Name and Last Name fields visible
[ACT] fill 'First Name' with test value: 'SmokeTest'
[ACT] fill 'Last Name' with test value: 'Runner'
[ACT] click 'Save' or 'Update'
[WAIT] success toast OR page updates
[ASSERT] saved values shown in profile form (no XSS execution)
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loaded
[ACT] select 'Delivery' and proceed to address entry
[ACT] fill address 'First Name' with test value: 'SmokeTest'
[ACT] fill address 'Street Address' with value: '123 Test St'
[ACT] click 'Save' or proceed to next step
[WAIT] address saved or checkout proceeds
Assertions:
[DOM] profile save completes without JS alert, console error, or unexpected redirect (VCST-4803 regression)
[DOM] saved name 'SmokeTest Runner' displays in profile — no script tags rendered as text or executed
[DOM] shipment address save completes without JS error or alert (VCST-4804 regression)
[DOM] no unexpected alert() dialogs triggered during save operations
